titlestmt.titleproper: Cooperative Extension Association of Tompkins County records4287
titlestmt.author: Compiled by N. Dean

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-10-20 18:18:54 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cooperative Extension Association of Tompkins County records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cooperative Extension Association of Tompkins County

did.physdesc: Reports, programs, meeting minutes, photographs, newsclippings.
did.abstract: General files related to county extension work, including publications, reports, photographs, and meeting minutes

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cooperative Extension Association of Tompkins County records, #4287. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: General files related to county extension work, including publications, reports, photographs, and meeting minutes.
